content: Very useful so far. Ads aren't long at all.
goated app. It literally does what it says, little to no ads and an easy interface.

It was fine for a few weeks. Then, when I needed to record something crucial, I started recording. Then I pressed pause. When I clicked resume, it didn't start recording again. I clicked to discard about 20 times. Did not do anything. I clicked Save multiple times, and again, it's not doing anything. It just stuck there. It is not a good app if I can't rely on it.

I actually really like this app. I love all of the details and all of the features. they are easy to navigate, but I am extremely disappointed that with nearly every recording I have taken there's always this crackling noise that I can't get rid of. and no matter what version of recording I do (standard, music, etc.) there's always this crackling noise. very disappointed.
it was good for a while, but when I updated the app, it deleted all my past recording. 😡
this app is totally useful. Less ads and longer time to record.

I am new to this Voice Recorder App. It is Pretty Simple to use for Recording My Guitar Leads/Rhythm Mostly along with my Amp with an auxiliary and jack Cord to Record Music. I got Dwayne's Johnson almost finished! I just have to Re-Record because I had Family Guy on and I don't want background noise other than what's being played and Recorded to this App. I rate 5 Stars! Works Really Well for Overall Sound at 25 Decibels and 5 Watts out of My Boss Amplifier. Awesome Music Recorder App!

Very reasonable on the ads for what feels nice and professional with easy to use features. Haven't worked out editing much but would like to be able to clear gaps and shuffle, cut paste etc. Mark and note in app which can't seem to do easily on mobile.

It is the best recorder I have found for jam sessions and anything else for which I need the raw recording If it weren't for the ads I sometimes have to restart the app for - because they never end - I would give it five stars
I like recording with this though , but I don't want the audio quality is kind of bad but I still like it
I seen this on my dads phone and it has lycls
i like this app but it has too much ads
Simple and functional. The free version has ads, but I'm happy with the ease of use.
